payload.tactic: have Hcrux : forall (c : ciphertext), c \in Mem.lc{hr} => dec RO.m{hr} Mem.k{hr} c <> None<:nonce * associated_data * bytes> => c.`1 \in take (i{hr} + 1) ns{hr} => forged{hr} || test_poly (nth witness<:nonce> ns{hr} i{hr}) Mem.lc{hr} (mk_rs (oget RO.m{hr}.[nth witness<:nonce> ns{hr} i{hr}, C.ofintd 0])).`1 (mk_rs (oget RO.m{hr}.[nth witness<:nonce> ns{hr} i{hr}, C.ofintd 0])).`2.

manager_note: Committed tactic accepted; the EasyCrypt proof state changed.
